channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cacti evolving at remarkable speed, scientists discover why
item.description: A study of over 750 cactus species reveals they are evolving rapidly, contrary to their slow-growing appearance.

item.title: Century-old mystery of tough tire rubber finally solved
item.description: Scientists have explained why adding tiny particles to rubber makes it stronger, a puzzle that persisted for 100 years.

item.title: Halley's comet may be named after the wrong person
item.description: A medieval monk may have beaten Edmond Halley to one of astronomy's greatest discoveries by nearly 700 years. Researchers say Eilmer of Malmesbury rec...

item.title: Quantum breakthrough could revolutionize teleportation and computing
item.description: Scientists in Japan have developed a new way to instantly detect elusive quantum "W states," a major milestone for quantum technology. The breakthroug...
